questions.prompt:
You recently had dinner at a restaurant called 'Cozy
Corner.' While part of the experience was
enjoyable, the service was poor. You want to To: Ms. Lee
provide feedback to the restaurant owner, Ms.
Lee. Subject: Feedback on dining experience
Write an email to Ms. Lee. In your email, do
© Describe what you enjoyed about your
dining experience. |
© Explain the issues you faced with the
service and your order.
© Suggest ways to improve the service for
future customers.
Write as much as you can and in complete
sentences.
